indicators.name: red leather sofa
indicators.rationale: The sofa is too large and uncomfortable for sleeping.

indicators.name: metal coffee table
indicators.rationale: The coffee table is too hard and not suitable for sleeping.

indicators.name: large windows
indicators.rationale: The large windows allow light to enter during the day, which can be disruptive for sleep.

indicators.name: hard floor
indicators.rationale: The hard floor is not comfortable for sleeping.

reasoning_summary: This indoor scene is not well-suited for sleep (primary). The presence of a large sofa and metal coffee table makes it unsuitable for sleeping. The large windows and hard floor also contribute to the unsuitability of the space for sleep.
